message.content:
Survey recent activity across the ORGANVM workspace at /Users/4jp/Workspace/. I need a picture of what's been happening recently:

1. Check git logs (last 5-10 commits) in these key directories:
   - /Users/4jp/Workspace/organvm-i-theoria/ (check what repos exist, then git log in 2-3 active ones)
   - /Users/4jp/Workspace/organvm-ii-poiesis/ (same)
   - /Users/4jp/Workspace/organvm-iii-ergon/ (same)
   - /Users/4jp/Workspace/organvm-iv-taxis/ (same)
   
2. Look for any recent RELAY.md or session handoff docs across the workspace (glob for **/RELAY.md)

3. Check /Users/4jp/Workspace/a-organvm/ for any plans/ directory or .claude/plans/

4. Read the workspace-level CLAUDE.md at /Users/4jp/Workspace/CLAUDE.md — specifically the "System Overview" section for current statistics

5. Look for any active branches (not just main) in repos that seem to have recent work

This is purely research — gather and report what you find.

content.text: I'll survey the ORGANVM workspace systematically to get a picture of recent activity.
